name: eu-nis2
description: EU NIS2 Directive (Directive (EU) 2022/2555) — Reference plugin: scope determination across essential vs important entities, Article 21 risk-management measure evidence checklist, and the 24h/72h/1mo incident-reporting runbook. SCF-backed gap assessment via the crosswalk.

framework_metadata.regulator: National competent authorities + CSIRTs designated by each EU Member State; coordinated EU-wide by ENISA
